description: Kuber Resources Corporation, through its subsidiaries, engages in the manufacture, distribution, and sale of wood panels; as well as provides formaldehyde treatment services in China. The company also provides treatment of flame retardant wood panels through a patented process, as well as act as an intermediary for buying and selling of commodities. The company was formerly known as Uonlive Corporation and changed its name to Kuber Resources Corporation in November 2022. Kuber Resources Corporation is headquartered in Admiralty, Hong Kong.
